examples.title: Smart Contract Example
examples.description: This is an example of a simple smart contract written in pseudocode.
examples.code:
IF (condition) THEN
 execute action
ELSE
 execute alternative action
END IF
examples.explanation: This smart contract checks a condition and executes an action if the condition is true. If the condition is false, it executes an alternative action.

examples.title: Decentralized Application Example
examples.description: This is an example of a simple decentralized application written in pseudocode.
examples.code:
WHILE (condition) DO
 execute action
END WHILE
examples.explanation: This decentralized application executes an action repeatedly while a condition is true.

examples.title: Ethereum Smart Contract Example
examples.description: This is an example of a simple Ethereum smart contract written in Solidity.
examples.explanation: This Ethereum smart contract executes an action when the executeAction function is called.
